success_banner.title: Vote Successfully Submitted!
success_banner.subtitle: Your vote has been securely recorded and confirmed.

gratitude.message: Your participation in this election is important and helps shape our community's future. Your vote has been successfully recorded with the highest level of security and privacy.

vote_summary.title: Your Vote Summary
vote_summary.no_vote: You chose not to vote for this position

what_next.title: What Happens Next?
what_next.step_1_description: Your vote is encrypted and stored securely in our voting system.
what_next.step_2_description: Once all votes are submitted and the election period ends, votes will be counted.
what_next.step_3_description: Election results will be published after all votes have been counted and verified.
what_next.step_4_description: You can verify your vote at any time using your verification code.

security.title: Your Vote is Secure
security.description: Your selections are encrypted end-to-end and protected with industry-standard security protocols.

privacy.title: Your Privacy is Protected
privacy.description: Your vote is anonymous and cannot be traced back to you. No personal information is stored with your vote.

verification.title: You Can Verify Later
verification.description: Keep your verification code safe. You can use it to verify that your vote was recorded correctly.

footer.message: Thank you for exercising your right to vote!
